title: How Many Days in Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Three full days is the sweet spot.** You can cover the historic centre, one museum and one neighbourhood without rushing every meal.
**Two days works; one day is only a taster.** In two days, add one area beyond Mitte. With one day, stay on the Alexanderplatz-to-Reichstag line.
**Berlin's essentials are closer than the map suggests.** Alexanderplatz to the Reichstag is a flat **30 to 40 minute** walk through the historic centre.
**Add a fourth or fifth day for depth or a day trip.** Potsdam is **30 to 40 minutes** by regional train; Sachsenhausen is under an hour.
**Check closures before fixing the schedule.** Many Museum Island museums close Monday, Pergamon stays closed until **4 June 2027**, and the free Reichstag dome needs advance ID registration.
**Start with a central walk on your first morning.** It gives you bearings before you spend time crossing the city.
